channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists create supercharged vitamin K that helps the brain heal itself
item.description: Scientists in Japan have created powerful new vitamin K-based compounds that may help the brain regenerate lost neurons â a breakthrough that could on...

item.title: NASAâs Fermi telescope reveals the power source behind monster supernovae
item.description: NASAâs Fermi telescope has detected what may be the first confirmed gamma-ray signal from a superluminous supernova â one of the most extreme explosio...

item.title: Scientists discover ancient single-celled ancestors persist in human blood
item.description: Evidence suggests human blood cells may originate from single-celled ancestors that lived 700 million years ago.

item.title: Scientists say they have reversed brain aging with a nasal spray
item.description: Texas A&M researchers developed a nasal spray that may reverse brain aging by reducing inflammation and restoring energy systems.
